project_type: Go Linux init binary for k3OS
test_framework: go test with testify (assert/require/mock), race detector enabled
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'make test' to verify all tests pass. 2. Run 'make lint' (golangci-lint run ./...) to verify no lint issues. 3. Run 'make build' to verify binary compiles.
setup_instructions: Go 1.24+ is pre-installed. Run 'go mod download' to fetch dependencies.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network - full access. Go 1.24.3 available. golangci-lint 2.1.6 available. Most source files have //go:build linux tags - tests will still run on Linux sandbox.
contribution_requirements: TDD mandatory (RED/GREEN/IMPROVE). 80%+ coverage. Conventional commits. golangci-lint must pass. Small interfaces defined where used. Dependency injection via constructors.
key_patterns: 1. Interfaces defined in internal/iface/iface.go for OS boundaries. 2. Package-level vars for injectable dependencies in enterchroot (loopAttacher, ensureLoopFn). 3. Structs with func fields for DI in mode/detect.go and boot/init.go. 4. Finalize uses iface.FileSystem mock pattern with testify/mock. 5. Files use //go:build linux tags. 6. Tests use t.Parallel() throughout.
directory_structure: internal/iface/ - interfaces for OS boundaries. internal/mode/ - boot mode detection. internal/boot/ - init orchestrator. internal/boot/finalize/ - boot finalization (TTYs, hostname, etc). internal/enterchroot/ - pre-chroot filesystem setup. main.go - entry point, wires DebugCmdline.
